category_sources: source_facts.description says ClassAds are used by HTCondor Central Manager; official HTCondor ClassAds page describes ClassAds as the language used for HTCondor resource/job matching.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is classads; official HTCondor page title is Classified Advertisements and uses ClassAds for the library/language.
docs_sources: Official HTCondor ClassAds page links to the C++ implementation tutorial, API documentation, and language reference manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official htcondor/htcondor GitHub repository is the HTCondor source repository, but the Homebrew package is the standalone ClassAds distribution.
tags_sources: source_facts.description ties ClassAds to HTCondor Central Manager; official HTCondor ClassAds documentation describes resource/job matching and the C++ implementation.
